data.title: Crescent Biopharma Announces Grants of Inducement Awards
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Crescent Biopharma, Inc. based in Waltham, Mass., announced that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors has granted options to purchase a total of 35,325 shares of the company's ordinary shares to three non-executive employees. These options are part of the Equity Inducement Awards under the Crescent Biopharma, Inc. 2025 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. The approval for these options was given on March 26, 2026, and they were crucial for the employees' acceptance of their positions at Crescent. The options were granted in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), as the company aims to advance new therapies for cancer patients.

data.title: Aqua Metals to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results and Host Investor Conference Call on March 31, 2026
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Aqua Metals, Inc. (NASDAQ: AQMS), a leader in battery metals recycling and refining, disclosed plans to reveal its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company will also offer a business update on March 31, 2026, and conduct a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: AT&T Declares Dividends on Common and Preferred Shares
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Dallas, it was announced by the board of directors that a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share has been declared on the company's common shares. This dividend is set to be paid out on May 1, 2026. Key takeaways from this announcement include the declaration of the quarterly dividend amount of $0.2775 per share by the board of directors.

data.title: Catherine Hershey Schools for Early Learning Hosts Fourth Annual Early Childhood Education Leaders Summit in Hershey
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Hershey, Pennsylvania, Catherine Hershey Schools for Early Learning (CHS), a branch of Milton Hershey School (MHS), organized the fourth yearly Early Childhood Education (ECE) Leaders Summit at Hershey Lodge. The event saw the participation of around 500 early childhood education professionals.

data.title: indie Announces New Employee Inducement Grants
data.description: In Aliso Viejo, California, indie Semiconductor (Nasdaq: INDI), a pioneer in automotive solutions, revealed the allocation of equity awards known as the “Inducement Grants” from its 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. These awards were given to new hires at indie. The Compensation Committee of indie Semiconductor’s Board of Directors had sanctioned these grants. For more details on these equity awards, interested parties can visit the company's investor relations website at: https://investors.ind.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Cancellation of Treasury Shares
data.description: Singapore-based company Hafnia Limited (ticker codes: OSE: HAFNI, NYSE: HAFN) recently concluded its share buyback program, as announced on 27 January 2025. A total of 12,681,253 shares repurchased between 2 December 2024 and 27 January 2025 have been cancelled. Additionally, 40,000 shares located in the Company's treasury account were also part of this program.

data.title: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. Reports Q4 and FY 2025 Results
data.description: In Houston, Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. (NASDAQ: VGAS) revealed its financial performance for Q4 and full year 2025. The company, under CEO George Burdette, emphasized a revised approach aiming to efficiently utilize its technology and resources. Strategic options such as a sale or merger are also under consideration.

data.title: KBRA Releases Research – Private Credit: Deep Dive on AI and Software
data.description: In New York, KBRA has conducted research on the influence of artificial intelligence (AI) on software and private credit portfolios. They concluded that AI brings manageable credit risks to software companies owned by direct lenders. Although sponsor-backed borrowers with upcoming maturities and AI-related vulnerabilities may experience notable challenges, resulting in a slight rise in default rates, the majority of software-related borrowers seem to be resilient. AI is expected to have a varied impact on the industry, but KBRA views the risks as controllable.

data.description: On March 27, 2026, AllianceBernstein National Municipal Income Fund, Inc. data.title: Fastenal Company Announces Conference Call to Review 2026 First Quarter Earnings
data.description: Winona, Minnesota - Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) disclosed details for its upcoming conference call to discuss the first quarter results and current operations for 2026. The conference call is scheduled to take place on Monday, April 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. central time. For those interested in participating, the call will be broadcasted live on the Internet. The link to access the call is provided at https://investor.fastenal.com/events.cfm. The presentation for the conference call will feature essential information, including updates on various aspects.

data.title: Investor frustration with war in Iran leads to stock drop - S&P 500 down 9% from January peak, worst weekly loss in 4 years.
data.description: The S&P 500 index has declined by almost 9 percent since reaching a peak in January. This marks its most significant weekly losing streak in approximately four years.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics Reports 2025 Year End Financial Results and Highlights, and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: In 2025, a company successfully gathered more than $20 million in total funds. By December 31, 2025, they maintained a balance of $11.9 million in cash and cash equivalents. With this financial standing, they are projected to have enough cash flow to last until the second quarter of 2027. Additionally, a study manuscript on the IT-01 Study focusing on the use of INT230-6 as a standalone treatment in 64 refractory metastatic cancer patients was published.
